videos.headline: Notre Dame's Jeremiyah Love hurdles a USC defender
videos.description: Jeremiyah Love catches a pass, then turns up field and hurdles a USC defender for a 20-yard gain.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Notre Dame’s Jeremiyah Love hurdles a USC defender) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jeremiyah Love powers into the end zone for the Irish
videos.description: Jeremiyah Love fights his way into the end zone for a 1-yard rushing touchdown to give Notre Dame a 7-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jeremiyah Love powers into the end zone for the Irish) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Notre Dame's Mitchell Evans goes up for a TD grab
videos.description: Riley Leonard throws it up to Mitchell Evans, who comes down with the ball for a Notre Dame touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Notre Dame’s Mitchell Evans goes up for a TD grab) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: ND's Christian Gray takes off for 99-yard pick-six
videos.description: Christian Gray returns the interception the length of the field for Notre Dame to all but ice the win.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (ND's Christian Gray takes off for 99-yard pick-six) 2024/11/30 ESHEET
